description: CompositionWhite and navy blue striped polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a white collar, long sleeves, buttoned chest placket, the numbers 4 and 7 stitched on the left chest and a vented hem FitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsCelebrate life in style with this white and navy blue striped polo t-shirt from wrangler. Created from soft cotton, this tee is perfect in style and gives exemplary comfort for those chilly evenings. Team this with jeans and suede shoes or shorts and sandals for unparalleled cool.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
